'''Zareb''' was a member of the [[Intendant caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. After the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquered]] and [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], Zareb was appointed [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] of [[Numesh Sector|Numesh]]. [[Nom Anor]], in the guise of [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]], decided to bring him down by placing [[Shamed Ones]] spreading the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]] into his household, and having the [[Priestess/Legends|Priestess]] [[Ngaaluh]] discover them. The evidence against Zareb was very strong—too strong for [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]]. Conducting his own interrogation, he discovered that Ngaaluh was planting the Shamed Ones in the households of various Prefects. However, he executed Zareb anyway, to continue the purge of heretics already going on.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
